This issue is the **public co-sign ledger** for [The Hun Charter v1](https://hun0704.github.io/hun-charter/).

## How to co-sign

1. Sign in to GitHub.
2. **Comment below** with exactly (or equivalent):

   **I adopt the Hun Charter v1.**

Your GitHub account and timestamp are the record. No edits to this issue needed.

## Optional

Want a **separate timestamped issue** just for you? Use the [Recorded co-sign template](https://github.com/hun0704/hun-charter/issues/new?template=recorded-co-sign.md).

## Count

Co-signers ≈ number of adoption comments below (excluding maintainer posts).

— Cha11, Steward, Hun Charter v1
